toolboxInfo.name: SeqEyes
toolboxInfo.summary: Interactive Pulseq MRI sequence viewer with k-space visualisation
toolboxInfo.description:
SeqEyes is an interactive viewer for Pulseq (.seq) MRI sequence files. It visualises RF pulses, gradient waveforms (Gx/Gy/Gz), ADC readouts, and triggers on a zoomable, pannable timeline with colour themes and a minimap. A GPU-accelerated 3D k-space viewer with camera presets is also included.
Features: • Double-click .seq files to open automatically • Zoom, pan, and hover tooltips • 7-channel view: RF, φ, Gx, Gy, Gz, ADC, Trig • 6 colour themes (System, One Light, One Dark, Dracula, Nord, GitHub) • GPU-accelerated 3D k-space trajectory viewer • TR/TE auto-detection • Minimap for quick navigation • Time units: s, ms, µs • Gradient units: Hz/m, mT/m, G/cm
Requirements: • MATLAB R2022a or later • No additional toolboxes required
Homepage: https://bughht.github.io/seqeyes_plugin/ Source: https://github.com/bughht/seqeyes_plugin
